overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game (Red Dead Redemption 2) showing a character walking through a foggy, historic city resembling New Orleans. The character traverses wet cobblestone streets, passes wrought iron fences and brick buildings with balconies, approaches a stone church, interacts with an NPC at the entrance, and explores a courtyard before returning to the street.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy cobblestone sidewalk next to a wrought iron fence

multi-story brick building with wrought iron balconies and shuttered windows
large willow tree with hanging branches extending over the street
black cast iron street lamp with decorative scrollwork

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a foggy cobblestone sidewalk bordered by a wrought iron fence on the left and historic brick buildings with balconies on the right. Overhanging willow trees and ornate street lamps line the path as the character moves through the misty morning atmosphere.

events.description: turns left and crosses the street toward the stone church entrance

agents.ego_description: crossing the cobblestone street and approaching the church courtyard

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving along the street in the distance

entered.detail: large gothic stone church with arched windows and detailed masonry
garden area with blooming flowers behind the iron fence
wooden barrel sitting in the middle of the courtyard path

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the cobblestone street and approaches a large stone church. A horse-drawn carriage is visible in the distance, and the wrought iron fence now borders a garden area on the right as the character heads toward the church entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic church entrance with stone steps

events.description: approaches the church entrance where an NPC stands smoking

agents.ego_description: walking up the stone steps toward the church entrance

notable_agents.action: man in suit and hat standing at church entrance smoking a cigarette

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stone steps to the church entrance, passing large wooden doors set in a gothic stone archway. A man in a suit stands to the left smoking, and the surrounding area becomes more enclosed as the character reaches the building entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: church courtyard garden returning to city street

events.description: turns away from church entrance and explores the courtyard garden
turns back toward the street and continues walking

agents.ego_description: circling around the church courtyard, examining the flower beds, then returning to the street

notable_agents.action: woman in long dress walking away from the church toward the street

entered.detail: flower bed with purple blooming flowers in the church courtyard
flower bed with red blooming flowers near the tree
two-story blue building with white trim and wrought iron balconies
metal tram tracks embedded in the cobblestone street

segments.scene_description: The character explores the church courtyard with its vibrant flower beds and iron fences, then returns to the cobblestone street. A woman in a long dress walks ahead toward a distinctive blue historic building with balconies, and tram tracks become visible as the character approaches the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty, historic city district that transitions from a foggy residential street to the enclosed entrance of a stone church and back into an open urban intersection. It begins with the character walking along a cobblestone sidewalk bordered by wrought iron fences and brick buildings with balconies under the canopy of overhanging willow trees. As the character crosses the street, the perspective shifts toward a large stone church, passing a distant horse-drawn carriage and a garden area. The camera then follows the character up stone steps and through a gothic archway toward a man smoking by the wooden doors, momentarily enclosing the space. Finally, the scene opens back up as the character explores a vibrant flower-filled courtyard before returning to the street, following a woman in a long dress toward a blue historic building and visible tram tracks.
